alpha0_inv.name: inverse fine-structure constant alpha(0)^-1
alpha0_inv.note: CODATA 2022 adjusted value; alpha itself is the reciprocal.

alpha_hat_5_mz_inv.name: MSbar electromagnetic coupling alpha_hat^(5)(M_Z)^-1
alpha_hat_5_mz_inv.note: Five-active-flavour MSbar electromagnetic coupling at M_Z.

sin2theta_hat_mz.name: MSbar weak mixing angle sin^2 theta_hat_W(M_Z)

alpha_s_mz.name: strong coupling alpha_s(M_Z)
alpha_s_mz.source: PDG 2025 average used in Electroweak fits

c_m_s.name: speed of light in vacuum c

hbar_j_s.name: reduced Planck constant hbar
hbar_j_s.source: SI exact h divided by 2*pi; rounded here for engineering use

newton_G.name: Newtonian gravitational constant G
newton_G.source: CODATA 2018/2022 conventional value; uncertainty kept explicitly
